title: Dottie Ellis-Merki Letter and DIRTWERX Decal
collection: Harry’s Room — The Harry Leary Collection
description: A framed handwritten letter from Dottie Ellis-Merki displayed with a DIRTWERX decal. The correspondence discusses the decal and a future memorial for Harry at Dirtyfest, preserving relationship and intent alongside the object.
provenance_summary: Received from Dottie Ellis-Merki, as identified in the collection title and visible signature.
qualifications: The letter and decal are directly pictured.
The handwriting has not been fully transcribed or independently authenticated in this release.
